title: Asymptomatic and symptomatic cardiac toxicity associated with immune checkpoint inhibitors: insights from a Japanese registry.
snippet: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) are a cornerstone of cancer therapy; however, immune-related adverse events, including myocarditis, pose significant challenges. Furthermore, limited data exist on the pathology of mild or asymptomatic cases. This study aimed to characterize the clinical, biomarker, and pathological features of ICI-associated cardiac toxi...
